reviews.title: Terribly overpriced and deceiving .
reviews.text: Stunning false advertisement. They advertise the room is 28M2, but we measured and it's only 21m2! Terrible liars. The breakfast is horrible. Some staff are decent but many were indifferent and incompetent. Be sure to do your research and look at other much cheaper hotels. This place is a scam.
reviews.response:
Dear Hung,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback.
We are truly sorry to hear that your experience did not meet expectations. Please rest assured that we take your concerns seriously, especially regarding room size accuracy, breakfast quality, and service consistency. We are currently reviewing the details you mentioned to ensure improvements where needed.

While we regret that your stay was not satisfactory, we appreciate your comments as they help us grow and refine our guest experience. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back with better impressions in the future.

Sincerely,
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team
reviews.room_type: Lumen Amoris, City View, 1 Queen Bed With Balcony

reviews.title: Don't go.
reviews.positives: The weather.
reviews.negatives: Phu Quoc "sunset town" , is a complete fake. It's massage parlour, hotel, restaurant.,on every street.There is literally  nothing else.it has thousands of vacant apartment buildings, all looking the same.They have tried to recreate the Amalfi coast. But it's all fake. Our hotel was located across the road from a disco bar. So don't try and go to sleep before 10.30 pm. The hotel pool is located across the road  adjacent to the disco bar, so we didn't bother using it. Unless you want a beach holiday, don't go.

reviews.title: One of the worst hotels
reviews.text: We travel alot and I have never had such a bad experience with a hotel. First of all kwe had booked 2 rooms and 1 day before arriving in Phu Quoc at this hotel we received a message from Agoda that one of the rooms had been cancelled, without any explanations and we were refunded. We had booked two rooms because we are travelling with a teenager and all rooms had only one bed. We emialed Agoda and the hotel right away and they assured us that the reservation was confiremd for 2 rooms but when we got there they were all confused. After a while they offred us one room with a king bed and wanted to charge us for the extra bed. They said we might have the extra room for the remainer of our stay.. This was on the 24th of December. We were not very happy.. The staff was not very helpful and made our stay even worst. We just regret sprending our Christmas vacation there, it was very strssful and not relaxing at all. We did not have a good time. I would not recommend this hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Carole,  

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and frustration you encountered during your stay. It is truly regrettable that there was a miscommunication regarding your booking, and we understand how disappointing this must have been, especially during the holiday season.  

Your feedback regarding our staff’s responsiveness is deeply concerning, as we strive to provide a seamless and comfortable experience for all our guests. Please rest assured that we will review this situation internally to ensure that similar issues do not occur in the future.  

We truly regret that we did not meet your expectations and appreciate your honest feedback. If there is anything we can do to regain your trust, please do not hesitate to reach out to us directly.  

Sincerely,  
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team
reviews.room_type: Caeli Amoris, City View, 1 King Bed with Window

reviews.title: No ocean front room if you dont like loud music!
reviews.positives:
A few of the staff were very helpful and lovely. Location near the beach with a nice empty pool. 

Cable car and waterpark tickets was included which was great.

They provide a free city tour with their buggy and take great pics of you! The driver was lovely! 

They helped us to change our room to their new hotel 5 min away and we had an excellent stay in their other hotel. 

Breakfast was bad with more lunch choices than breakfast choices. One of the waitress was coughing all over the food.
reviews.negatives:
Recently a very loud bar opened right in front of the hotel. Disco music until midnight. Extremely loud in the ocean front rooms. Impossible to stay there if you sleep early or have kids. 

The colourful decoration of the hotel looks nice on pictures but I found it stressful. Especially because rooms are small already.

Some staff members were excellent but others seem clueless and acted like trainees.

Stored luggage was constantly unsupervised. Anyone could have stolen it.

reviews.title: Pretty average
reviews.text: Ok but nothing special

Sincerely,

Cons: rooms definitely not soundproofed, you hear music from the show and the fireworks up until 11 pm, evn the vibration from the bass. Small buffet. The first staff we dealt with was very dismissive and not accommodating at all but the staff the following day were more helpful and friendly

reviews.title: Decent Hotel with Bad receptionist
reviews.text:

Staff: cleaning staff are polite, restaurant staff are polite and nice.
Food: Average spread but the quality was good
Room: Sometimes the colors could blind you. Besides, the room size is a bit small for a family.

Cons: The receptionists during the day need a bit of education. They were rude throughout my 4-5 different interactions. They seem to not understand empathy nor sympathy while denying a request or while explaining a policy.

They charged 45% of the room charges in addition for my 7 year old. With no extra bed provided. That’s the only hotel I experienced this.
reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We appreciate your kind words about our cleaning and restaurant staff.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the experience you had with our reception team and for any inconvenience caused during your stay. Your comments have been noted carefully and will help us improve our service quality.

Thank you again for your valuable feedback.

Best regards,
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: Phu Werks is a very nice island, way over developed already and most of it unoccupied
reviews.positives: Great view of harbor and shows. Very pleasant staff , thank you ! Location is very good.
reviews.negatives: No water in the morning all 3 days, could not shower and delayed our activities. Very very noisy ! Loud pounding rap music all night till 2 am , was told it would stop at 10 p.m. but not the case. Wine provided in room at exorbitant price but I purchased since honeymoon, you have to wait for corkscrew from building down the street. Do not go to Kraft beer across the street, extreme scam, only beer they have is dark black warm beer, staff very unpleasant. I watched dozens and dozens of people enter and abruptly leave quickly.

reviews.title: Noise noise
reviews.text: Location super for view of symphony of the sea show and fireworks 15 minutes ,,Otherwies Unrelenting music  nois from two competing bars/clubs till early hours of morning non stop base thumping the whole room vibrates..same owner Hotel and nightclub/bar 3 nights there now totally exhausted,Would not stay there even for free “Unless musi c switched off  . Then club ( (Aldo maybe ok for night owls who want Ravevtill morning
reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We truly appreciate your kind comments about our location and views. However, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the surrounding nightlife and noise.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and provide a better experience.

Sincerely,

The hotel manager was quick to provide us an alternative to change room on the next day but we decided to stay since we wanted the room to be next to each other. In addition the hotel provided us 6 free tickets to see the Kiss of the Sea Show. I also love that the booking already included Sunset Town Tour and free cable car ticket which included admission to waterpark and the hotel provided us transportation to go to the cable car station and to watch the show. It was a pleasant stay at Sunset Town when booking with Venice Hotel. Kudos to the management.
reviews.negatives: The staff could have improved communication in English or have translation apps in hand. In addition the view from balcony is quite disrupted by the construction on the beachside

reviews.positives: Loved everything.  Breakfast was OK not my favorite.  Hotel staff were super wonderful and planned everything. You are right in the heart to things with the Firewords performance outside your window if staying with sea view (high up).
reviews.negatives: All good.

reviews.title: Go there only for the view
reviews.text:
Pros: 
The hotel is at great location and offers amazing views of the sunset town. Beautiful venetian look.
We booked via Agoda,  offering us complimentary sunset town tour - for 45 min. They also provided free buggy service within the sunset town, but needs prior communication to get the buggy.

Cons: The hotel is right over couple of pubs.. so it is very loud music till late night. 
Staff was not able to speak English at all, very money oriented. Tiny waterbottles-350ml provided in the room. When my old father asked them for water on 2nd day early morning, they said since we were to checkout later that afternoon,  they won't give us water bottles.  My father tried explaining them to charge us for the water bottles, but they couldn't even understand such simple request. Even basic English understanding was lacking from the staff.
I was charged additional for my daughter who turned 6, two days before our check-in,  but no additional amenities were provided accordingly. 

As we were celebrating our anniversary,  I had requested for cake and asked them to charge me accordingly.  They couldn't do it.

The buffet had hardly few choices.  Other big properties like Wyndham had charged us lesser yet provided great buffet spread.
reviews.response:
Dear Spandana,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback about your recent stay with us.
We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed the beautiful sunset views and the complimentary services provided, such as the sunset town tour and buggy ride.

We are, however, truly sorry to learn that some aspects of your stay did not meet your expectations. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused regarding the communication issues and the water bottle policy. Please be assured that we take your comments seriously and will work closely with our team to improve English proficiency and service standards to better accommodate our international guests.

Regarding your special requests, we regret that we were not able to fully meet your expectations on this occasion, especially during such an important celebration for your family. We are continuously striving to enhance our services and offerings, and your feedback is invaluable in helping us achieve that goal.

We

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Perfect location for watching the bay/ocean view and the fireworks show if in the ocean view with balcony type of room. Very nice breakfast either way additional cooked to order choices from the dally  offerings. One day stay was perfect.

reviews.title: Small, Charming and Romantic, But More of a 3-Star Experience
reviews.text:
This is a romantic, small hotel tucked away in a quiet Venetian lane—perfect for couples looking for a cozy and intimate stay. The location is excellent, close to main attractions yet peaceful. The food was enjoyable, and the staff were friendly and attentive throughout our stay.

However, it's important to set expectations: if you're looking for 5-star luxury or full resort-style amenities, this may not be the right fit. While the atmosphere is charming, the overall facilities and experience align more with a 3-star category.

Great for a romantic getaway, but not for those expecting upscale, high-end services.
reviews.response:
Dear Ravi,
Thank you for taking the time to leave such a thoughtful and detailed review.
We're happy to hear you enjoyed the romantic atmosphere, peaceful location, good food, and friendly staff. We also truly value your honest expectations regarding amenities and overall experience.

Your perspective is helpful for other travelers and for us as we continuously work to improve. We hope you had a lovely time in Phu Quoc and would love to welcome you again!

Best wishes,
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: You can enjoy the night show.
reviews.text: I stayed overnight on Friday night. The room was adequately spacious and clean. The variety of the breakfast buffet was average, but sufficient. Above all, the water show visible from the ocean-side room was wonderful. It was an enjoyable show using lasers, projection mapping, and fireworks. However, it was a bit disappointing that there was only one trash can next to the toilet. The round-trip transportation to and from the airport was excellent.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.positives: A wonderful hotel in every sense of the word. A wonderful view of the sea. The hotel has a wonderful pool overlooking the sea. The room’s view of the fireworks. The hotel’s location is wonderful. Let me talk about the cleanliness of the hotel. It is very, very clean. The rooms are a bit small, but they have a wonderful special character.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Breakfast was bad and there were few options compared to the room price. The front desk staff was often absent, and support was slow. 
1. Check-in was late; the bed linens were not changed in time for check-in, and I had to wait 2 hours for someone to change the sheets for me. If I hadn't called, no one would have changed them. 
2. I booked a shuttle from the hotel to the cable car in the morning, but in the afternoon, the staff said I had to wait for the shuttle to arrive without knowing when it would come, so I ended up calling an external shuttle that cost twice as much. 
3. The hotel said their pool was across the street, but the staff by the pool said it couldn't be used without their permission after 4 PM because the pool is for the bar. 
‼️ I understand that there are many guests and they may not need Vietnamese customers, but with this kind of service, international guests will also leave.
reviews.response:
Thân gửi Anh/Chị Son,

Cảm ơn Anh/Chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm sau khi lưu trú tại Venice Hotel Phu Quoc. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi một số dịch vụ trong quá trình lưu trú chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của Anh/Chị.

Những phản hồi liên quan đến thời gian nhận phòng, việc thay ga gối, hỗ trợ xe điện cũng như thông tin về khu vực hồ bơi đã được chúng tôi ghi nhận và sẽ làm việc lại với các bộ phận liên quan để cải thiện quy trình phục vụ.

Chúng tôi chân thành xin lỗi vì những bất tiện đã xảy ra và hy vọng vẫn có cơ hội được chào đón Anh/Chị quay lại trong tương lai để mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn.

Trân trọng,
Đội ngũ quản lý Venice Hotel Phu Quoc

reviews.title: Expensive business hotel
reviews.text: Surrounded by cheap hotels, we booked this place for more than double the price because of the good reviews. It’s hard to sum it up in one word, but while the staff's hospitality is top-notch, the facilities are what you would expect from a flashy business hotel. There wasn't a single table in the room. I chose a room with a balcony hoping to watch fireworks, but there was barely enough space for two people to stand, so in the end, we decided to book a show and go see it. Check-in was advertised as possible from 1 PM with early check-in, but when we arrived, they mentioned that it might be difficult even at the standard 2 PM, so we decided to go out for lunch first. The area has tuk-tuk transportation available, but when I requested a ride back via the LINE app as instructed, I didn't get a read receipt, so I walked back instead. At check-in, they mentioned, "The bar outside might be noisy until 11:30 PM, so you may not be able to sleep," which would have been good to know before booking! We were the type that didn’t mind it at all, though. They provided various explanations during check-in, and if we didn't understand, they used Google Translate, but I wish they had summarized things on a small piece of paper instead of explaining while hastily writing down notes without giving us a copy. Luckily, I managed to remember the Wi-Fi password. There were city tours at 4 PM and 5 PM, and the tuk-tuk driver would take pictures for us. Unfortunately, because we were riding with what seemed like local guests, I couldn’t understand a word of the explanation. They offered transportation to the airport, but since we had to move to another hotel the next day, I was going to give up on it. However, the staff advised me that it would be more economical to go to the airport and take a taxi from there, so I took their advice. As I mentioned at the beginning, I commend the staff's response, but the room was certainly not worth the price. At checkout, they asked me for a high rating on Google, but I will keep my review here.

reviews.title: Can't fault the location
reviews.text:
We had a 4 night break at this hotel in Sunset Town, Phu Quoc., had a third floor sea facing room with 2 small balconies and a great view of the Kiss Bridge and the evening show, which was spectacular, with jet skis, hydroflights and all manner or lights and music. This is held every night at 7.45pm for around half an hour and then fireworks to round off at 9.30 pm. 
However, that's not quite the end of it - there are 2 bars below the balcony which blast music until around 2am so if you are a light sleeper or an early nighter - this may not be the place for you.
The breakfast doesn't really cater for western tastes which would be fine, except nothing is hot. You can order various eggs which is included in the booking price, though sometimes lost in translation didn't cause too much problem.
All in all, a lovely hotel in a very sanitised area if Phu Quoc
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Worth Staying For Some People
reviews.text:
Originally, we booked a two-balcony suite, but after realizing it was on the 3rd floor, we were allowed to move up to a smaller but better-view, 5th-floor "ocean-view" room. There, we had a fantastic view of the fireworks and the Kiss Bridge. 

Negatives:

Our flight arrived at 7:10 PM, so we didn't qualify for the free airport shuttle that they often advertised.  We didn't realize this until after we booked the room. They apologized and suggested we pay them for an airport pickup to fix the problem. We used Grab for 1/2 of the price they suggested.

They don't have a pool (as advertised), but you are allowed to use the pool at the private bar across the street. However, you can only use it until 7 pm. After that, you have to pay 300k per person to use it each night. 

The room's balcony is standing-room only, so any idea of sitting on a balcony and watching fireworks (like advertised) wasn't possible.

reviews.title: The hotel in Sunset Town has a good view of the fireworks.
reviews.text:
The location is good, and because my room is on a high floor, I can see the fireworks show from the balcony, which is great. The hotel offers a free airport transfer service, and communication was pleasant. 
However, the room is not very big, and there is only a king-size room available, no twin room. I brought a child with me, and the front desk asked me to pay an extra fee; the child’s fee is 650,000 VND per night, which feels a bit expensive because I wasn't provided with an extra bed, nor were there any additional toiletries or towels given. The supplies provided to me each day were still based on the amount for two people. The breakfast options are limited and rather monotonous; my child was sleeping in the morning and did not go for breakfast. I feel that the additional fee for the child is not worth it, and I am dissatisfied with this aspect. 
Traveling around is relatively convenient; there is a convenience store downstairs, it’s a short walk to the cable car, and the SPA is also close by. There’s a bar downstairs, which can be quite noisy. 
Overall, it’s still worth staying here.

You shouldn't expect much from the rooms in the south, but this place has a well-structured system (staff at the front desk available 24 hours).

The location is right in front of the Kiss Bridge beach, making it great for watching performances (almost a top priority). 
There are plenty of massage shops and restaurants nearby, so it’s quiet for sleeping.

In the south, it seems like you only need to check out Symphony of the Seas, as you can swim right in front of it and have an amazing view. 
* The swimming pool is only charged during performance times, costing 300,000 dong per person, which is much better than buying expensive tickets.

reviews.title: Das Hotel ist neu - wie der gesamte Stadtbereich - sehr schön 10 Punkte mit kleinen Abstrichen
reviews.positives:
Ein kleines Hotel aufgeteilt auf 2 Gebäude. Das Hotel liegt zentral in Sunset Town und alles ist fußläufig erreichbar. Es ist liebevoll gestaltet und sehr verspielt. Wer das Gefühl haben möchte etwas besonderes zu erleben sollte in Sunset Town übernachten. Ein Ticket für die Seilbahn/Wasserpark ODER die Abend Light Show sind bei der Übernachtung inklusive.  Beides lohnt sich - wirklich proffesinell und schön aufgemacht. Man kann sich vom Hotel direkt überall hinfahren lassen. Das Frühstück wird serviert ala Carte - man kann soviel bestellen wireman möchte und alles inklusive der Latte/Cappuchino oder Kaffee ist lecker. Das gesamte Personal ist super. Ich habe glückliche Familen, Paare und Reisfefreunde getroffen - alle waren zufrieden. 
Spa, Restaurants,Cafes, Selbahn, Theatro alles im direkten Umfeld
reviews.negatives:
Das Hotel ist wirklich gut - die folgenden Punkte nicht schwerwqiegend
-der Pool ist leider in einem anderen Hotel - man kann sich da zwar hinfahren lassen - aber das sollte man bei Buchung wissen
-es sollte aufmarksamer und intensiever bei Raumabgabe auf Themen wie Funktion Warmwasser, Toilettenbedienung, Klima usw - nicht jeder kennt diesen High Tech Standard
-das Restaurant bietet ideales Frühstück - ist ansonsten aber tagsüber und abends teilweise für die Portionen zu teuer 
-aktuell befindet sich auf der Meerseite eine Baustelle vorm Hause -

reviews.text: The decor is special, the cleanliness is high, the staff service is good, and there is a free buddy car to view the sunset town. However, there is no perfect pool, which is a drawback. Fortunately, if you book a sea view room, you can enjoy beautiful day and night scenery and watch the free fireworks show every night. It is close to the night market, which is small, but there is a supermarket nearby that adds to the evening activities. You can also participate in island hopping and snorkeling, and being close to the pier reduces travel time. The hotel also provides a free buddy electric car to the night market, cable car station, or other restaurants in the sunset town, making it convenient for guests to travel.

reviews.title: Birthday in Phuoc
reviews.text:
We stayed at the Venice Hotel for four nights in a sea-view balcony room on the fourth floor. We absolutely loved it! There are many great things about this hotel, but there are a few things to consider before booking.

The hotel is beautiful and small, with a very authentic feel. The room was clean and well-appointed, and the location is great for all the local attractions and offers, including free airport pickup, cable car rides, and buggy rides around the resort.

However, as a couple in our late 50s, we found two very noisy bars outside that played music until 2 am. If you’re looking for an early night, this hotel might not be the best choice for you. But if you’re willing to stay up late, the views of the shows and fireworks are really great.

The breakfast wasn’t great for our taste buds. The food wasn’t hot, it was just warm at best, and the English-speaking staff made a lot of mistakes. But for what we paid, it was still a great breakfast. Thank you!
reviews.response:
Dear Graeme,

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed feedback about your recent stay at Venice Hotel Phu Quoc. We’re delighted to know that you loved the authentic atmosphere, convenient location, and complimentary services like airport pickup and cable car rides.

We sincerely appreciate your honest comments regarding the nearby noise and breakfast service. Your feedback is truly valuable as it helps us improve our services, ensuring an even better experience for future visits.

We hope to welcome you back to Venice Hotel Phu Quoc again soon!

Sincerely,  
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: One of the best
reviews.text:
I had a fantastic experience at the Venice Hotel in Phu Quoc! If you’re lucky enough to get an ocean-view room on the upper floors, you’ll be treated to a nightly fireworks display at 9:30 PM—an absolute delight. The view of the sea is stunning, and you can even see the iconic Kissing Bridge from your balcony.

The location is perfect, with a vibrant night market nearby where you can enjoy delicious local dinners and pick up unique souvenirs. The hotel offers free transfers, both to and from the airport, and even provides complimentary transport around Sunset Town, which makes exploring super convenient. Don’t miss the cable car ride—it’s just a short trip away and offers breathtaking views.

The staff’s hospitality is top-notch—friendly, attentive, and always ready to help. The only minor downside was some noise from the bar below, but it quiets down after 10 PM, so it didn’t disrupt our rest.

Highly recommended for anyone looking to enjoy the best of Phu Quoc with comfort and charm!
reviews.response:
Dear Mohamad,

Thank you for sharing such a detailed and thoughtful review of your stay. We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the ocean-view room, nightly fireworks, and the vibrant surroundings of Sunset Town. It is wonderful to know that our services and complimentary transfers made your trip more enjoyable and convenient.

Your kind words are truly appreciated, and we look forward to welcoming you back to Venice Hotel Phu Quoc for another memorable experience.

Sincerely,
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: Nên ở tại Venice nếu qua đêm tại thị trấn hoàng hôn
reviews.positives:
Vị trí tuyệt vời. Đi vài bước ra biển, chợ đêm vui phết, cầu hôn. Phòng có ban công thì có thể đứng trên phòng ngắm pháo bông, ngắm hoàng hôn, xem show jetki từ xa, ko cần chen chúc, xếp hàng, chờ đợi giữa nắng nóng. Từ khách sạn đi xe máy 10 phút đến Bãi Kem, 16 phút đến Bãi Sao. Đây là 2 bãi cát trắng, đẹp sạch và được tắm miễn phí. 

Bữa sáng theo kiểu gọi 1 món trong menu cỡ 5 món kèm quầy salad và nước uống nho nhỏ, còn có bánh mì sandwich kèm mứt và bơ. Đầu bếp đã xây dựng menu đồ ăn rất chất lượng.

Đẹp, sạch, thơm, tiện nghi tuyệt vời, Giường êm, Nội thất gỗ tự nhiên, Bồn cầu toto phun nước tự động kiểu nhật, Bộ đồ dùng 1 lần có cả kem chống nắng.

Mình còn được tặng vé cáp treo đi Hòn Thơm tham quan chơi trò chơi và công viên nước miễn phí cho 2 người lưu trú. Khách sạn có dịch vụ xe điện đi theo tour và chở khách ra ga An Thới và hồ bơi, phòng gym miễn phí.

Nhân viên khách sạn từ lễ tân đến phục vụ nhà hàng đến nhân viên lái xe điện… đều cực kỳ nhiệt tình và dường như nỗ lực 300% để mang lại sự hài lòng nhất có thể với khách. Các bạn đã hỗ trợ mình check out nhanh nhất có thể và đã giúp mình đến ga An Thới kịp chuyến cáp treo cuối cùng của buổi sáng để đi Hòn Thơm.

reviews.title: Erikoinen kokemus.
reviews.positives: Hotelli on siisti ja mukavan omaperäinen. Saimme myös ilmaiset cable car liput (jotka ehdottomasti kannattaa käyttää).
reviews.negatives:
Hotellissa on A ja B rakennus, jotka sijaitsevat vierekkäin. Meitä ei päästetty sisään rakennukseen kun he tarkistivat passimme ja ihmettelivät kummassa rakennuksessa majoittaudumme. Aamiainen oli kuukauden Aasian matkamme huonoin - olimme kymmenessä hotellissa. Lähtiessämme meille näytettiin kädestä pitäen kuinka hotellille tulisi antaa parhaat arvostelut kaikesta - jotain jota emme ole koskaan kokeneet aiemmin. Olimme erittäin vaivautuneita tämän 10 minuuttisen demonstraation aikana. Hotellissa on myös erikoiset omat säännöt ja hinnasto sääntörikkomuksista jotka pitää allekirjoittaa. Jotain jota emme ole ennen nähneet. Allekirjoitetusta ”sopimuksesta” ainut dokumentti jäi hotellille. 
Kaikesta kritiikistä huolimatta, voisin suositella Veniceä max kahden yön yöpymiseen jos haluaa tutusta Sun Set Townin hullutukseen. Toisaalta nämä voisi myös käydä kokemassa taksilla jostain saaren oikeista rantakohteista. Suosittelen La Verandaa tai Dustin Princess Moonrise hotelleita.

reviews.title: Inclusive offer at Venice
reviews.text:
We had a great time in Venice. Thanks to the Venice hotel staff, they are all nice and helpful. I booked a city view room at a low budget as the Agoda platinum account gave me the chance of a free upgrade, and Venice assisted me in upgrading to an ocean view room where I could see the awakening sea, the symphony of the sea, and the perfect fireworks at the end of the "Kiss of the Sea" show. All free, just because of the ocean view room offer; I am thankful to the Venice staff. The shuttle bus is also free for two ways, and we also enjoyed a sunset town tour on a Venice electric car for free as well. From the drivers to the receptionist, kitchen staff, they are all nice, friendly, and helpful. The breakfast was good too, more than my expectations for the very low budget I spent.

Venice Hotel Phu Quoc was a great choice, leaving us with good memories.

With love and see you soon,

Jade Can
reviews.response:
Dear HA,  

Thank you for sharing such a detailed and heartfelt review of your stay at Venice Hotel Phu Quoc. We are truly delighted to hear that you had a great time and that our team contributed to making your experience memorable.  

It’s wonderful to know that you enjoyed the complimentary upgrade to an ocean view room and had the chance to witness the stunning "Awaken Sea" and "Symphony of the Sea" performances, as well as the fireworks during the "Kiss of the Sea" show. We’re thrilled that you found the additional services, such as the free shuttle bus and the Sunset Town tour on our electric car, to be valuable additions to your stay.  

Your kind words about our staff—from the drivers, receptionists, and kitchen team—are deeply appreciated. Providing warm and attentive service to our guests is always our top priority, and we are so pleased to know you felt well cared for.  

It’s also great to hear that our breakfast exceeded your expectations, especially given the value of you

reviews.title: Не советуем т.к. есть варианты дешевле и с более лучшими видами и услугами.
reviews.positives: Понравился завтрак, чистота, оформление номера, дружелюбие персонала.
reviews.negatives: При заселении нам, хоть и вежливой форме было отказано в забронированном номере, который мы бронировали за несколько месяцев. За сутки до заселения, нас уверили, что все нормально и нас ждут... Когда мы начали настаивать, менеджер придумал несколько вариантов причин для отказа. В итоге, нам пришлось согласиться на номер более низкой категории за высокую цену. Мы уверены, что это была уловка отеля. В номере был очень плохой интернет. У нас под окнами был ночной бар и по этой причине было шумно до самой поздней ночи. Вид из окна был на вход в бар. В рекламе был бесплатный бассейн, но как оказалось, вечером он был платный и принадлежал кафе, расположенному рядом. Вся это ситуация испортила нам Новый год, который мы долго и тщательно планировали.

reviews.title: The best hotel
reviews.text: The exterior and interior of the hotel were very cute, and it felt more Italian than actual hotels in Italy. The staff were kind and I am full of gratitude for their attentive service. There are many spas and restaurants nearby, and the cable car, Kiss of the Sea show, St. Mark's Square, and Sunset Town are all within walking distance, making the location very good. It is a hotel I would like to stay at again when I come to Phu Quoc.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Красивый отель.
reviews.negatives:
Отель предлагает два бассейна , на тот, что на  крыше нужно ехать на машине ! Тот что внизу , с 7 вечера превращается в платный 

На ресепшене практически не говорят на Английском, если писать сообщения в вотсап как они просят , то ответ нужно долго ждать 

Забрала с собой тапочки в которых ходила по номеру и отелю, но как выяснилось, они не одноразовые .. что меня удивило. Они их моют и отдают следующим гостям!!!

В отеле очень шумно по вечерам, спишь будто в клубе. Внизу находится бар-клуб, который орет как сумасшедший.

Каждое утро приходит клининг, ровно в 9 утра. Мы попросили нас не будить, но так как они не понимают на Английском мы сталкивались с этим каждое утро!

Завтраки минималистичные, буквально нет НИЧЕГО. Лапша, картошка, йогурт и яйца на выбор по приготовлению.

Пляж внизу и правда есть:)) но там никто не купается и он не оборудован для отдыха.

Только за красивый отель и идеальную уборку ставлю 3/10. 

Думаю, что по меркам острова, можно снять отель в половину дешевле в этой локации.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
If you go to Sunset Town at Phu Quoc, I highly recommend this place. The rooms are very beautiful, clean, and have a sea view. However, there is construction and development going on around the area. The hotel's location allows you to walk to the cable car station, watch the clock tower, visit the kissing bridge, and see the "Kiss of the Sea" show without going too far. Additionally, there are shuttle services to various locations and evening city tours, as well as transfers from the airport (but they operate on a schedule).

The hotel provides a complimentary Hon Thom cable car ticket to the Sunworld water park, but this ticket must be used the next day, so it's advisable to plan your trip well. However, our group wanted to go on the day of check-in, and the hotel kindly exchanged our ticket for the "Kiss of the Sea" show, which was very good.

I highly recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Неоднозначный отель
reviews.positives: Интересный дизайн отеля, некоторые представители персонала хорошо говорят по английски, отличная возможность посмотреть ежедневное шоу из номеров, но только верхних этажей. Приятная опция - билеты на канатную дорогу.
reviews.negatives:
1. При заселении долго и нудно разъясняют правила проживания и услуги в отеле, на это уходит около 40 минут. Ощущение, что тебя не ждут как уважаемого гостя. Предупреждают о штрафах за курение, распитие напитков, свою еду в номере... Об этом всем можно прочитать на сайте отеля. Зачем так усложнять процедуры заезда ?
2. Выразили готовность встретить в аэропорту. Прождал на жаре +32  полчаса, в результате взял такси и добрался до отеля, где узнал, что водитель немного опоздал... При выезде обратно предложили вместо назначенного времени уехать в аэропорт на час раньше, что тоже не создает ощущение хорошего сервиса.
3. Бассейн, которым предлагают пользоваться, очень грязный после ночных дискотек в нем. Мусор после ночи убирается не всегда. Зачем тогда предлагать такую опцию, если ее качество очень низкое.
4. Если хотите ощутить себя на тусовочной Майорке, то вам сюда. Каждый вечер до поздна гремит музыка, закрытые окна не помогают. Но это не вина отеля, все из-за близости дискобара, которые расположен напротив.
5. Скудный завтрак для отеля уровня 4 звезды.

reviews.title: Extraordinary boutique hotel
reviews.text:
Venice Hotel is located in the center of Sunset Town. It's close to a night market, a few supermarkets, a local wet market, as well as the port. 
The room is very clean, the towels and bedding are with fresh smell. 
Our room is 36 square meters with a balcony overlooking the Kiss of the Sea Bridge. We had enjoyed the firework from our balcony.
The staff are nice, helpful, and sincere. 
We were offered a 30 minutes sunset tour by a hotel buggy which was really nice. We also received 2 complimentary cable car tickets to the waterpark. 
We are pleased with the entire experience and we would definately book with Venice Hotel again next year!
reviews.response:
Dear Chan,

Thank you for sharing such a wonderful review of your stay at Venice Hotel Phu Quoc. We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our central location in Sunset Town, close to the night market, local shops, and the port. It’s fantastic to know that your room was clean, fresh, and provided a perfect view of the Kiss of the Sea Bridge, where you could enjoy the fireworks from your balcony.

We're also glad that you appreciated the sunset tour by our hotel buggy and the complimentary cable car tickets to the waterpark. It's heartwarming to hear that our staff made a positive impact on your experience with their helpful and sincere service.

We look forward to welcoming you back next year for another wonderful stay!

Sincerely,  
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: The cost performance is the best, really.
reviews.text: It seems that just the ticket for the Hontom Sam costs around 60,000 won for two people if bought in Korea, but you can get accommodation + breakfast + Hontom Sam Water Park + cable car + free buggy (used it about 2-3 times) for around 80,000 won; I don't think you can find a better deal than that. The room condition was neat and the staff were friendly. If you get an ocean view, you have a view of the Kiss of the Sea? It seems possible to view it from the hotel (I couldn't, I had a view of the opposite building).

reviews.title: Офигенно
reviews.positives:
Расположение идеальное. Практически идеально из окна номера видна 2 шоу и фантастический салют от третьего шоу. Внизу доступ в мини бассейн с джакузи в баре на набережной ночной бар с пивом и дискотекой. Очень красиво. Но немного шумновато вечером для тех кто рано ложится спать. Но в 23.00 уже тихо. В 5мин ходьбы современный ночной рынок. В городе много туалетов, это удобно, так как еда специфическая. Сам городок неописуемой красоты. Набережные, лестницы, эскалатор, дома, зелень. Все в итальянском стиле. Потрясающе. Отель при заезде делает бесплатно шатл тур небольшой по основным местам города. Мы жили 4 дня и нам в подарок шли билеты в аквапарк и парк развлечений на отдельном острове в 8км. А добирались мы туда по самой длинной канатной дороге в мире. Что выходила из здания колизея. Того самого что в Риме.
Отель находится в центре города, вы можете легко дойти пешком, но если не хотите пешком трансфер отвезёт по городу и даже на соседний пляж Кхем. 
Посещение сансет тауна и этого отеля очень понравилось.
reviews.negatives:
Пляж. Есть прямо под окном отеля теоритеческий пляж. Красивое место у поцелуева моста, где проходят шоу. Но там скорее загорать чем купаться.
Завтрак. В целом не плохой. Был суп, яйцо порционно, был буффет, но мы ожидали для отеля 4 зв и достаточно высокой стоимости, большего разнообразия блюд. Может это связано что места для ресторана не много, Но голодным не уйдёшь.

reviews.title: Fabulous , unique & colourful hotel
reviews.text: My honest review. Fabulous &  good quality lovely hotel located just right in the center of Sunset Town.  Free round trip airport transfer & buggy service is awesome. Breakfast menu changed every day, the pannacotta is so yummy, room is very pretty decorated & clean. Can see the firework from the oceanview room. The staffs are very helpful aspecially Larissa the  hotel Manager & her Assistant An. Good english ! Will come back to stay here soon. Thanks Larissa for always helping me :-)
reviews.response:
Dear Djheny,

Thank you very much for your wonderful and detailed review. We’re delighted to know you enjoyed the hotel design, ocean view, fireworks, breakfast, and our convenient services.

Your kind words about Larissa and An truly mean a lot to our team. We’re so happy to know they helped make your stay memorable and comfortable.

We look forward to welcoming you back again soon.

Best regards,
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Понравилось все, очень красивый отель в Итальянском стиле, сервис в отеле на высоте все подскажут и расскажут, предлагают небольшую обзорную эскурсию, что находится рядом. Номер дали выше категории, поддержка в Вацап 24/7, любую проблему решают мгновенно. Подарили билеты на канатную дорогу и аквапарк, за это отдельное спасибо. Трансфер до аэропорта и обратно. Все стараются. Трансфер до канатной дороги и, до водного шоу. Разнообразные завтраки по меню.
Шума от стройки ночью нет, ночью работы прекращают. Отличный вид из окна, второе окно это - французский балкончик. В номере все необходимое. Отель превзошел все ожидания.
Если вам необходима забота, уют, и отдых без проблем то вам сюда.Знали бы, что тут все так,то отдыхали бы больше дней в этом отеле.

Нам есть с чем сравнить, отель удивил!!!

 Many thanks to Christine, Anha and the general manager of the hotel.  We highly recommend staying at this hotel and will definitely come back next time!

reviews.title: Отличный уютный отель, в хорошем месте
reviews.positives:
Замечательный уютный отель! Все локации, из за которых приезжают в Sunset Town Phu Quoc, совсем рядом. В качестве подарка от отеля, предоставляются бесплатные билеты на канатную дорогу и в аквапарк. У нас был номер, с видом из окна на море, прямо на мост поцелуев и театр водного шоу. До канатной дороги, 5 минут пешком, отель, при желании, подвозит на каре. Персонал выше всяких похвал! Особенно хочется поблагодарить персонал администрации на стойке регистрации - милую девушку Trang молодого человека Loc. Они мгновенно решают все возникающие вопросы и создают домашнюю атмосферу. Завтраки понравились, это готовые сеты по меню. Предлагают несколько готовых вариантов. Варианты есть европейские, американские и вьетнамские. Мы были там в середине мая, отель предоставлял ещё и скидку на проживание. Но и без нее, это  хороший вариант. 
Будем в этих краях - проблемы выбора отеля для нас больше нет, только в этот отель)
reviews.negatives: Прямо перед отелем, небольшая огороженная зона, там идет ремонт набережной, но нам это абсолютно не мешало.

reviews.title: Amazing stay
reviews.text:
Hands down one of the best looking hotels we've stayed at. Extremely beautiful property. Complete asthetic vibes. The staff were very friendly. 

Breakfast buffet spread was good. We had one of the best seafood pasta in the restaurant. 

The free shuttle service from the airport to the hotel was very helpful. The inclusive buggy service was very nice. Sunset town has my heart and I would definitely recommend Venice hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Leora,

Thank you very much for your wonderful review and for sharing such a detailed experience with us.

We are truly delighted to know that you enjoyed the design and aesthetic of our hotel, as well as the friendliness of our team. It’s especially rewarding to hear that you loved the breakfast, your dining experience at our restaurant, and the seafood pasta.

We’re also glad that the airport shuttle and buggy service around Sunset Town added convenience to your stay, and that the ocean view and vibrant surroundings made your visit even more memorable.

Your kind recommendation means a lot to us, and we sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another amazing stay.

Best regards,
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team

reviews.title: 3D2N 301 Guest
reviews.text:
Locations is very good... Just infront of the gastro pub which you can hav buffet dinner + symphony of the sea perform... Ticket can be bought via hotel or online... No walk in accepted... 
Hotel provides sunset tour which is FOC... should register for it... 5pm, last tour will get sunset view and the buggy driver will help us to take the photo... Breakfast is very good too... bread, salad, fruits, cheez, mayo... You may ask us for the Menu Breakfast of the Day such as Noodles, Rice, Soup to the waiter or waitress... Its free too... Omelletes, hav to order from the waiter or waitress... Room is very classis and when you walk in is very fragrance... I like it very much... FYI, take the sea view room... I am only gotten the city view as sea view, its sold out very fast... Will go back again and Venice Hotel is my Opt...
reviews.response:
Dear Jenie,

Thank you very much for your wonderful and detailed review. We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our location, the Sunset Town tour, the fireworks view, and our breakfast selection. It is especially lovely to hear that our team and buggy driver helped make your stay more memorable.

Your kind recommendation truly means a lot to us. We look forward to welcoming you back to Venice Hotel Phu Quoc again soon.

Sincerely,
Venice Hotel Phu Quoc Management Team
